text.title: AI Feature UX Pattern Library Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from feature brief to a designer-actionable UX spec.

step.name: enumerate-catalogue
step.input: The seven core patterns (confidence indicator, refusal surface, edit-handoff, why-trail, undo gate, progressive disclosure, batch operations).
step.action: Confirm the design system has reusable components for each — extend if missing before continuing.

step.name: classify-feature
step.action: Tag the feature on three axes: ui_surface (bool), refusal_possible (bool), irreversible (bool).

step.name: apply-decision-tree
step.action: Walk content/06-decision-tree.xml to land on a mandatory pattern subset.

step.name: compose-ux-spec
step.action: For each mandatory pattern, name the surface where it appears, the trigger condition, the copy/microcopy, the component reference.

step.name: design-review-and-validate
step.action: Run scripts/validate-output.py; route to design owner; iterate.
step.output: Signed UX spec attached to the feature brief.
